about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your culinary journey starts here
about.story1: Welcome to Cook With Me, where we believe that good food brings good mood! Our mission is to inspire home cooks of all levels to create delicious meals that bring joy to their tables.
about.story2: From traditional family recipes to modern culinary creations, we're here to guide you through every step of your cooking journey.
about.story3: Join our community of food lovers and discover the magic of cooking at home. Let's create good food and good mood together!

contact.title: Get in Touch

contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's on your mind...
